channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.description: Matthew McLaughlin Computer science tutor ✉️ matthedm@uci.edu About me In 2018, I graduated with my B.S in Computer Science from the University of California Irvine. During my school years, I tutored the introductory python series for the freshman class. I have taught for Girls Who Code and the Coder School in Irvine. Since 2020 I have offered private tutoring via zoom. Goals Develop problem solving skills Foster good study habits Empower them to conceptualize problems and solve them with code Have fun and keep the lessons interesting to the student Languages I have taught in the past Racket dialect called Begginer Student Language Python C++ Java ( I have helped students prepare for A.
